title: Eldertide
description: Eldertide brings mystical creatures into your world, each with unique abilities to help on your journey.
body:
![Eldertide Main image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/917dcea31598f2068e82e4704eec94f446b6908d_0.webp)



**Borin** - The Dwarven Skeleton Companion - A tamable, mystical skeleton dwarf that helps with various mining-related tasks. - Can be tamed by offering diamonds, gaining loyalty. - Comes with its own inventory to collect and store valuable items like diamonds, emeralds, and ores. - Automatically collects nearby resources and throws items to its owner when nearby. - Executes specialized tasks: - **Digging**: Excels at mining specific areas. - **Lighting Up Areas**: Places torches to brighten your surroundings. - **Strip Mining**: Mines efficiently in straight paths. - **Spelunker**: Gives the player the spelunker blessing. - Interacts through a custom GUI when tamed, offering task management. Dynamic Gameplay Interaction - Teleports to its owner when separated. - Switches between "follow" and "wait" modes as needed. - Engages in combat when threatened, with attack animations and sound effects. - Friendly features, like dropping a humorous "left the game" message upon death. Immersive Sound Design - Unique ambient sounds, hurt effects, and death audio. - Uses custom and existing sound effects to enhance the experience.
Planned features include more mystical companions with unique skills to enrich gameplay!





**NeoForged:** - Requires the recommended **NeoForged** version for your version of Minecraft. - Put **Eldertide-NeoForged** in the `mods` folder.
